# Date/Time Functions (Index)

## Session/time controls
- `GetYYYYMMDD()`
- `GetDay()`, `GetWeek()`, `GetMonth()`
- `SecondsFromTime(hhmm)`
- `SecondsTillTime(hhmm)`
- `RegularTradingStart(GetYYYYMMDD())`
- `RegularTradingEnd(GetYYYYMMDD())`

## Bar/time context
- `GetTime()`
- `GetAggregationPeriod()`

## Typical use
- Intraday session filters
- Open/close window conditions
- Day/week/month reset logic
